programme.title: 2003. Conis ajuda Luffy e seus companheiros e iniciar sua missão de resgate, mas o Chapéu de Palha tem um pressentimento. A busca por respostas desperta a ira de Deus contra o bando! programme.title: 2003. Zoro confronta um Tubarão do Céu faminto às beiras do Altar de Sacrifício e Luffy, Usopp e Sanji tentam sobreviver a uma ilha que os quer mortos! Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mayumi Tanaka [Luffy], Kazuya Nakai [Zoro], Akemi Okamura [Nami] Diretor: Kōnosuke Uda, Junji Shimizu

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E26

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E27

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E28

programme.title: 2008. Light tenta descobrir onde Mello e da máfia se escondem. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E29

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E30

programme.title: 2008. Near contata o novo quartel geral da força especial e determina que Kira está entre os seus integrantes. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E31

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E32

programme.title: 2008. Light tem como objetivo investigar Kiyomi, enquanto os integrantes do corpo especial escutam pelo auto-falante. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E33

programme.title: 2008. Aizawa percebe o que está acontecendo e alerta Near, o qual já sabia sobre as notas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E34

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E35

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E36

programme.title: 2008. Embora Mikami tenha escrito os nomes de todos no Death Note, estavam vivos. Near consegue o Death Note e tudo é revelado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E37

programme.title: 2007. O brilhante, mas entediado estudante da escola Light Yagami encontra-se mantendo o poder da vida e da morte em suas mãos, o Death Note. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E01

programme.title: 2007. Enquanto os criminosos do mundo continuam a morrer, L atende representantes de várias nações. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E02

programme.title: 2007. Ryuk o Shinigami que deixou cair o Death Note no mundo humano, avisa a Light que alguém está no seu encalço. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E03

programme.title: 2007. Light, conhecido mundialmente como Kira, prova a extensão dos poderes do Death Note. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E04

programme.title: 2007. Soichiro Yagami exige uma reunião em pessoa com L quando ele descobre que ele secretamente levou agentes do FBI para o Japão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E05

programme.title: 2007. Light se reune com uma mulher no departamento de polícia, pois tem uma mensagem importante para o Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E06

programme.desc: Death Note - T01E07

programme.title: 2007. L coloca microfones e câmeras nas casas dos membros do grupo especial, incluindo a casa de Yagami, mas Light dá um passo a frente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The beloved Crawleys and their intrepid staff prepare for the most important moment of their lives. A royal visit from the king and queen of England soon unleashes scandal, romance and intrigue -- leaving the future of Downton hanging in the balance. Starring Hugh Bonneville, Jim Carter, Michelle Dockery.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: All the Highland clans attend the Earl of Mars annual hunting event at Braemar Castle, where the Earl makes an inflammatory proclamation.

programme.title: The Other Boleyn Girl
programme.desc: Family ambition pits British sisters Anne (Natalie Portman) and Mary (Scarlett Johansson) Boleyn against each other for the affections of King Henry VIII. Starring Natalie Portman, Scarlett Johansson, Eric Bana.

programme.title: Mommy
programme.desc: A peculiar neighbor (Suzanne Clement) offers hope to a recent widow (Anne Dorval) who is struggling to raise a teenager (Antoine-Olivier Pilon) who is unpredictable and, sometimes, violent. Starring Anne Dorval, Antoine Olivier Pilon, Suzanne Clement.

programme.title: My Spy
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Sophie catches JJ, a hardened CIA operative, spying on her family during a routine surveillance operation. In exchange for not blowing his cover, JJ begrudgingly agrees to show the precocious girl how to be a spy. Starring Dave Bautista, Kristen Schaal, Parisa Fitz-Henley.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: A veteran con man is thrown off his game when his former lover and protege unexpectedly appears and interferes with his latest -- and very dangerous -- scheme. Starring Will Smith, Margot Robbie, Adrian Martinez.

programme.title: Breakaway
programme.desc: A young man is torn between his traditional Indo-Canadian family expectations and his dreams of playing hockey. Starring Russell Peters, Rob Lowe, Camilla Belle.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: In order to save his home, an ogre along with a donkey makes a deal with a mean lord to rescue a beautiful princess. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: After returning from their honeymoon and showing home movies to their friends, Shrek and Fiona learn that her parents have heard that she has married her true love and wish to invite him to their kingdom, called Far Far Away. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: When the King falls ill, Shrek finds and trains an heir apparent while Princess Fiona fends off Prince Charmings advances. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A little girl develops extraordinary mental abilities, despite neglectful parents and a brutal headmistress. Starring Mara Wilson, Danny DeVito, Rhea Perlman.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: While Lex Luthor plots against him, the Man of Steel tries to reconnect with Lois Lane and find his place in a world that learned to survive in his absence. Starring Brandon Routh, Kate Bosworth, James Marsden.

programme.title: Catwoman
programme.desc: Patience Philips works as a graphic designer for Hedare Beauty, a cosmetics company on the verge of releasing an anti-aging product. When she inadvertently happens upon a secret her employer is hiding, she finds herself in the middle of a conspiracy. Starring Halle Berry, Benjamin Bratt, Sharon Stone.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: After leaving her island for the first time, Wonder Woman discovers her full powers and true destiny while fighting alongside men in a war to end all wars. Starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine, Connie Nielsen.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin. Starring Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne, Lance Reddick.

programme.title: Wick Is Pain
programme.desc: Join Keanu Reeves, director Chad Stahelski, and the extended "Wick" cast and crew as they go behind the scenes of a billion-dollar franchise that almost never happened. Starring Keanu Reeves, Chad Stahelski.

programme.title: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Four couples find that paradise comes at a price when they must participate in therapy sessions at a tropical resort. Starring Vince Vaughn, Jason Bateman, Jon Favreau.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Residents of a small fishing community in Newfoundland charm a doctor into becoming the towns full-time physician in order to secure a vital factory contract. Starring Brendan Gleeson, Taylor Kitsch, Liane Balaban.

programme.title: One Day in the Life of Noah Piugattuk
programme.desc: A government agent tries to get an Inuit man and his children to move to settlement housing. Starring Kim Bodnia, Apayata Kotierk, Benjamin Kunuk.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When Captain James Hook kidnaps his children, an adult Peter Pan must return to Neverland and reclaim his youthful spirit in order to challenge his old enemy. Starring Dustin Hoffman, Robin Williams, Julia Roberts.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: An inept dog groomer (Jeff Daniels) and a limousine driver (Jim Carrey) chase the latters dream girl (Lauren Holly) cross-country. Starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Lauren Holly.

programme.title: Yes Man
programme.desc: After attending a self-help seminar, a negative-thinking man brings about a change in his life by saying yes to everything. Starring Jim Carrey, Zooey Deschanel, Bradley Cooper.

programme.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery
programme.desc: In the 90s, a hip British agent must face his nemesis, who was cryogenically preserved since the 60s. Starring Mike Myers, Elizabeth Hurley, Michael York.

programme.title: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: The secret agent (Mike Myers) travels back in time to the 1960s to rescue his stolen mojo from Dr. Evil. Starring Mike Myers, Heather Graham, Michael York.

programme.title: Austin Powers in Goldmember
programme.desc: Austin must rescue his captive father and prevent Dr. Evils malevolent minions from taking over the world. Starring Mike Myers, Beyonce, Seth Green.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: A recent college graduate lands a job working for a famous and diabolical editor of a New York fashion magazine. Starring Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Adrian Grenier.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: All the Highland clans attend the Earl of Mars annual hunting event at Braemar Castle, where the Earl makes an inflammatory proclamation.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: An ex-secret service agent falls for his client, an actress and singer someone wants dead before the Academy Awards. Starring Kevin Costner, Whitney Houston, Gary Kemp.

programme.title: The Death and Life of John F. Donovan
programme.desc: A young actor reminisces about a dead American TV star and the correspondence they shared. Starring Kit Harington, Natalie Portman, Jacob Tremblay.

programme.title: Good Time
programme.desc: A bank robber stops at nothing to free his brother from prison, launching himself into a nightlong odyssey through New Yorks dark and dangerous criminal underworld. Starring Robert Pattinson, Jennifer Jason Leigh, Barkhad Abdi.

programme.title: Gravity
programme.desc: The destruction of their shuttle leaves two astronauts, Dr. Ryan Stone and Matt Kowalsky, stranded in space with no hope of rescue. Starring Sandra Bullock, George Clooney, Ed Harris.

programme.title: Paco
programme.desc: Paco is a Filipino immigrant living in Canada, trying to make ends meet so he can make a better life for his family in Manila. Starring Edward Escobal, Jason Asuncion, Khia Arkysha Donguines.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Magnus, Ashley and Will release three women from a crypt in Scotland and bring them back to the Sanctuary for refuge.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After thieves make a escape that baffles police, Dr. Magnus suspects an abnormals involvement; the robbery reminds Will of an old FBI case he could not solve; but this time he will.

programme.title: Whale
programme.desc: A young boy is sent to live with his grandparents in a remote indigenous community. Starring Timmy Masso, Grace George, Joe Martin.

programme.title: Percy
programme.desc: Third-generation farmer Percy Schmeiser joins forces with up-and-coming attorney Jackson Weaver and environmental activist Rebecca Salcau to fight a monumental legal battle against a corporate giant. Starring Christopher Walken, Christina Ricci, Zach Braff.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Stuart the mouse and Snowball the cat journey through New York City to rescue a friend from a falcon. Starring Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie, Jonathan Lipnicki.

programme.title: Long Life, Happiness and Prosperity
programme.desc: A child (Valerie Tian) unwittingly wreaks havoc around her when she tries magic spells to find a new husband for her divorced, overworked mother (Sandra Oh). Starring Sandra Oh, Valerie Tian, Tsai Chin.

programme.title: Think Like a Man
programme.desc: When the women in their lives buy a book by Steve Harvey and take its advice to heart, four men conspire to use the books insider information to turn the tables on the ladies and teach them a lesson. Starring Michael Ealy, Jerry Ferrara, Meagan Good.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Dr Parnassus
programme.desc: After a carnival troupe saves his life, a man (Heath Ledger) agrees to help its immortal leader (Christopher Plummer) collect five souls and win a bet with the devil. Starring Heath Ledger, Christopher Plummer, Verne Troyer.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: A black Southern woman (Whoopi Goldberg) struggles to find her identity after suffering years of abuse from her father and others over 40 years. Starring Whoopi Goldberg, Danny Glover, Margaret Avery.

programme.title: Small Things Like These
programme.desc: In 1985 coal merchant Bill Furlong uncovers disturbing secrets in a small Irish town thats controlled by the Roman Catholic Church. Starring Cillian Murphy, Eileen Walsh, Michelle Fairley.

programme.title: Awakenings
programme.desc: A doctor (Robin Williams) tries the drug L-dopa on an immobile man (Robert De Niro) and others like him in 1969 New York. Starring Robert De Niro, Robin Williams, Julie Kavner.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Renee risks everything to change her world around; Alan sets a trap that covers the entire Cape.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: The whole Great White operation is exposed, but some mysteries remain; Ray has a complicated ending; Jackie goes from feeling like a hero after an important discovery to the zero who let something critical get away.

programme.title: Edge of Winter
programme.desc: Stranded at a remote cabin in the wintertime, two siblings (Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White) must fight for survival as their increasingly unhinged father (Joel Kinnaman) loses his grip on reality. Starring Joel Kinnaman, Tom Holland, Percy Hynes White.

programme.title: Rebelle
programme.desc: African rebels force a village girl (Rachel Mwanza) to kill her own parents and join their army, but a miraculous event makes the rebels think she has supernatural powers. Starring Rachel Mwanza, Alain Bastien, Serge Kanyinda.

programme.title: The Private Lives of Elizabeth and Essex
programme.desc: Matronly Elizabeth I (Bette Davis) loves the dashing Earl of Essex (Errol Flynn), but politics come first. Starring Bette Davis, Errol Flynn, Olivia de Havilland.

programme.title: Boxcar Bertha
programme.desc: A young woman (Barbara Hershey) robs trains with a union man (David Carradine), a gambler (Barry Primus) and a friend in the Depression. Starring Barbara Hershey, David Carradine, Barry Primus.

programme.title: Rock n Roll High School
programme.desc: A teenager (P.J. Soles) and her friends get even with their principal to music by the Ramones. Starring P.J. Soles, Vince Van Patten, Clint Howard.

programme.title: The Shooting
programme.desc: A woman (Millie Perkins), two bounty hunters and a gunman (Jack Nicholson) ride into a desert and run out of water. Starring Millie Perkins, Jack Nicholson, Will Hutchins.

programme.title: Roger Corman: The Pope of Pop Cinema
programme.desc: "Roger Corman" is a by the numbers look at one of the most influential names in Hollywood; though many know him for his low budget exploitation movies, Roger Corman is also responsible for giving many names their start in the business.

programme.title: Stakeout on Dope Street
programme.desc: Three adolescents think their prayers have been answered when they stumble upon heroin abandoned by drug dealers. Starring Yale Wexler, Morris Miller, Abby Dalton.

programme.title: Made in England: The Films of Powell and Pressburger
programme.desc: Martin Scorsese reflects on the influence of filmmakers Michael Powell and Emeric Pressburger, whose decades-long collaboration led to a series of classics that made the duo a crucial part of British cinema.

programme.title: Bachelor Mother
programme.desc: An unmarried store clerk (Ginger Rogers) finds a baby on a doorstep and is quickly mistaken for its mother. Starring Ginger Rogers, David Niven, Charles Coburn.

programme.title: I Love You Again
programme.desc: A businessman (William Powell) snaps out of 9-year amnesia, reverts to con man and falls in love with his wife (Myrna Loy). Starring William Powell, Myrna Loy, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: Tarzans Greatest Adventure
programme.desc: A strange woman (Sara Shane) helps the ape man (Gordon Scott) stop a diamond hunter (Anthony Quayle) and his river gang. Starring Gordon Scott, Anthony Quayle, Sara Shane.

programme.title: Easy Life
programme.desc: A teenager (Bernard Thomas) becomes a hardened criminal. Starring Steven Geray, Bernard Thomas.

programme.title: It Happened in Brooklyn
programme.desc: A returned GI (Frank Sinatra), a British nobleman (Peter Lawford), a school janitor and a teacher (Kathryn Grayson) make music together. Starring Frank Sinatra, Kathryn Grayson, Peter Lawford.

programme.title: Berlin Express
programme.desc: International train passengers (Merle Oberon, Robert Ryan, Charles Korvin) comb postwar Frankfurt for a politician abducted by Nazis. Starring Merle Oberon, Robert Ryan, Charles Korvin.

programme.title: The Bad Seed
programme.desc: Odd fatal accidents lead a woman (Nancy Kelly) to realize that her 8-year-old daughter (Patty McCormack) was born to kill. Starring Nancy Kelly, Patty McCormack, Henry Jones.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: An Italian-American widow (Cher), engaged to a reticent suitor, falls in love with his brother (Nicolas Cage). Starring Cher, Nicolas Cage, Vincent Gardenia.

programme.title: Romeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Shakespeares Renaissance lovers (Norma Shearer, Leslie Howard) tragically defy their feuding parents. Starring Norma Shearer, Leslie Howard, John Barrymore.

programme.title: Murder, He Says
programme.desc: A pollster (Fred MacMurray) and a bank tellers daughter (Helen Walker) ask a mountain clan too many questions. Starring Fred MacMurray, Helen Walker, Marjorie Main.

programme.title: 711 Ocean Drive
programme.desc: A telephone repairman (Edmond OBrien) becomes the boss of a gambling syndicate he has ingeniously wired for profit. Starring Edmond OBrien, Joanne Dru, Otto Kruger.

programme.title: I Confess
programme.desc: A priest honors the sanctity of the confessional when he stands trial for a murder committed by one of his penitents. Starring Montgomery Clift, Anne Baxter, Karl Malden.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: A New York nightclub musician (Henry Fonda) and his wife (Vera Miles) endure an ordeal of mistaken identity. Starring Henry Fonda, Vera Miles, Anthony Quayle.

programme.title: The Big Shot
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Humphrey Bogart) lands back in prison, then escapes and flees with his ex-girlfriend (Irene Manning), a lawyers wife. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Irene Manning, Richard Travis.

programme.title: Thank Your Lucky Stars
programme.desc: A Hollywood tour-bus guide (Eddie Cantor) joins a wartime revue with Joan Leslie, Bette Davis, Errol Flynn and Warner Bros. stars. Starring Eddie Cantor, Dennis Morgan, Joan Leslie.

programme.title: 711 Ocean Drive
programme.desc: A telephone repairman (Edmond OBrien) becomes the boss of a gambling syndicate he has ingeniously wired for profit. Starring Edmond OBrien, Joanne Dru, Otto Kruger.

programme.title: The Stratton Story
programme.desc: Inspired by his wife (June Allyson) and son, Chicago White Soxer Monty Stratton (James Stewart) pitches with an artificial leg. Starring James Stewart, June Allyson, Frank Morgan.

programme.title: Blackboard Jungle
programme.desc: A dedicated teacher attempts to restore order in an inner-city high school where teenage lawlessness has taken root. Starring Glenn Ford, Vic Morrow, Anne Francis.

programme.title: Sunday in New York
programme.desc: An innocent upstater (Jane Fonda) visits her airline-pilot brother (Cliff Robertson) and meets a stranger (Rod Taylor) she tries to seduce. Starring Cliff Robertson, Jane Fonda, Rod Taylor.

programme.title: Whats Up, Doc?
programme.desc: A music professor (Ryan ONeal) visits San Francisco with his fiancee (Madeline Kahn) and meets a kooky woman (Barbra Streisand). Starring Barbra Streisand, Ryan ONeal, Madeline Kahn.

programme.title: How to Succeed in Business Without Really Trying
programme.desc: A window washer (Robert Morse) bluffs his way past a secretary (Michele Lee) on his way to the top of a global conglomerate. Starring Robert Morse, Michele Lee, Rudy Vallee.

programme.title: The Loved One
programme.desc: A deceased Hollywood personalitys nephew incurs debts and headaches as he tries to make the funeral arrangements. Starring Robert Morse, Jonathan Winters, Anjanette Comer.

programme.title: Girl Shy
programme.desc: A tailors apprentice (Harold Lloyd) turns literary lion and wins an heiress (Jobyna Ralston). Starring Harold Lloyd, Jobyna Ralston, Richard Daniels.

programme.title: Young Torless
programme.desc: A German boarding school student (Mathieu Carrière) observes sadistic classmates as they blackmail and torture another youth (Marian Seidowsky). Starring Mathieu Carrière, Bernd Tischer, Marian Seidowsky.

programme.title: Youth in Fury
programme.desc: An alienated young man flirts with extremism during a major student protest in this film directed by Masahiro Shinoda. Starring Shinichiro Mikami, Shima Iwashita, Hizuru Takachiho.

programme.title: Tickle Me
programme.desc: A singing rodeo rider (Elvis Presley) rocks a beauty spa/dude ranch and helps an exerciser (Jocelyn Lane) guard her treasure map. Starring Elvis Presley, Julie Adams, Jocelyn Lane.

programme.title: Girl Crazy
programme.desc: A publishers playboy son (Mickey Rooney) falls for the deans granddaughter (Judy Garland) at an all-male mining school. Starring Mickey Rooney, Judy Garland, Gil Stratton.

programme.title: The Kissing Bandit
programme.desc: A Boston milquetoast (Frank Sinatra) goes West and takes his fathers place as leader of an outlaw gang. Starring Frank Sinatra, Kathryn Grayson, J. Carrol Naish.

programme.title: The Girl of the Golden West
programme.desc: A lovesick sheriff (Walter Pidgeon) competes with a Mexican bandit (Nelson Eddy) for a mining-town saloonkeeper (Jeanette MacDonald). Starring Jeanette MacDonald, Nelson Eddy, Walter Pidgeon.

programme.title: The Unsinkable Molly Brown
programme.desc: A young woman (Debbie Reynolds) tries to enter 1890s Denver society but goes to Europe after her husband (Harve Presnell) strikes gold. Starring Debbie Reynolds, Harve Presnell, Ed Begley.

programme.title: The Harvey Girls
programme.desc: A mail-order bride (Judy Garland) stops in a frontier gamblers (John Hodiak) town to work as a waitress. Starring Judy Garland, John Hodiak, Ray Bolger.

programme.title: Annie Get Your Gun
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Annie Oakley (Betty Hutton) joins Buffalo Bills (Louis Calhern) Wild West Show and aims to win her man (Howard Keel). Starring Betty Hutton, Howard Keel, Louis Calhern.

programme.title: Man of La Mancha
programme.desc: Spanish novelist Cervantes (Peter OToole) tells of gaunt, aging and bemused Don Quixote, portly Sancho (James Coco) and buxom Dulcinea (Sophia Loren). Starring Peter OToole, Sophia Loren, James Coco.

programme.title: More Than a Miracle
programme.desc: A 17th-century Spanish prince (Omar Sharif) falls for a peasant (Sophia Loren) instead of one of his mothers (Dolores del Río) seven princesses. Starring Sophia Loren, Omar Sharif, Dolores del Río.

programme.title: Human Voice
programme.desc: In 1950s Naples, Italy, an aging woman rides an emotional roller coaster when her man leaves her. Starring Sophia Loren, Enrico Lo Verso, Alessandra Bonarotta.

programme.title: The Priests Wife
programme.desc: A suicidal singer (Sophia Loren) falls in love with a priest (Marcello Mastroianni) who goes on to become a monsignor in Rome. Starring Sophia Loren, Marcello Mastroianni, Venantino Venantini.

programme.title: An Angel at My Table
programme.desc: Troubled New Zealand writer Janet Frame is portrayed as a child (Alexia Keogh), as a teen (Karen Fergusson) and as an adult (Kerry Fox). Starring Kerry Fox, Alexia Keogh, Karen Fergusson.

programme.title: Rare Bird Alert
programme.desc: A journey across North America with a punk rock birdwatcher who explores how the climate crisis is affecting birds, from the viewpoint of birders.

programme.title: The Pretendians
programme.desc: Anishinaabe author Drew H. Taylor investigates how and why Indigenous identity, culture and art are being appropriated.

programme.desc: Jason Priestley takes a look at Harold Ballard, the controversial owner of the Toronto Maple Leafs. Ballards offensive behaviors range from backhanded contract dealings and sexist tirades, to serving a year in prison for theft and fraud.

programme.desc: Sierah Joughin, a 20-year-old college student, vanishes while biking home in rural Ohio; days later, her body is found, sparking an investigation; evidence uncovers a dark connection to a past crime.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: In Erie, Pennsylvania, things end horrifically when regional FBI Agent Jerry Clark arrives on the scene of a bank robbery in progress. When a bomb goes off, killing a pizza delivery person, it leads to a convoluted trail of clues.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: Ramon Sosa, a former boxer, marries Lulu and finds himself in the fight of his life; Ramon gets forced into drastic action when he receives a warning that his wife is hiring a hit man.

programme.title: Fake
programme.desc: Birdie decides to investigate Joe and with Allans help, discovers that his con was never about her; Birdie publishes an article to find closure but realises this will tie her to Joe forever.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Tina and Michael Careccia vanish from their Arizona home, sparking a desperate search; a discovery in the backyard reveals their fate; as investigators unraveled the case, details of that fateful night emerge, leading to justice.

programme.title: A Kidnapping in Amish Country
programme.desc: When an Amish woman realizes her daughter has been kidnapped, she turns to the only person who can help her -- her estranged best friend whos renounced the Amish way of life. Starring Jorja Cadence, Elise Bauman, Benjamin Sutherland.

programme.title: Smart Home Killer
programme.desc: A single mother moves into a state-of-the-art smart house, complete with an in-home security system. However, as strange glitches and stranger events start to occur, she soon realizes that shes not the only one watching through her security cameras. Starring Natalie Brown, Anwen ODriscoll, Athena Park.

programme.title: Emily
programme.desc: Emily Brontë struggles within the confines of her life, yearning for artistic and personal freedom. She finds romance before writing her seminal novel, "Wuthering Heights." Starring Emma Mackey, Fionn Whitehead, Oliver Jackson-Cohen.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: In Erie, Pennsylvania, things end horrifically when regional FBI Agent Jerry Clark arrives on the scene of a bank robbery in progress. When a bomb goes off, killing a pizza delivery person, it leads to a convoluted trail of clues.

programme.title: A Husband to Die For: The Lisa Aguilar Story
programme.desc: Attacked and left for dead, a pregnant woman starts to suspect that her own husband may be the culprit. With help from family and a determined legal team, she embarks on a courageous journey to protect her child, seek justice, and rebuild her life. Starring Keana Lyn, Jon McLaren, Marilu Henner.

programme.title: Smart Home Killer
programme.desc: A single mother moves into a state-of-the-art smart house, complete with an in-home security system. However, as strange glitches and stranger events start to occur, she soon realizes that shes not the only one watching through her security cameras. Starring Natalie Brown, Anwen ODriscoll, Athena Park.

programme.title: How Not to Hire a Hitman
programme.desc: New couple Leon and Valerie have one unfortunate thing in common, they both hate their exes. When Leons ex-wife and Valeries ex-husband are targeted for murder, it becomes a case of he said/she said. Who hired a hitman?

programme.title: Breach (2020)
programme.desc: Fleeing a devastating plague on Earth, an interstellar ark comes under attack from a new threat -- a shape-shifting alien force intent on slaughtering whats left of humanity.

programme.title: Deep Impact (1998)
programme.desc: As a comet is on a collision course with earth, humans have to prepare for their survival. They randomly select eight hundred thousand people to be saved in order to keep the human race alive.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity (2007)

programme.desc: A mother looking to reconnect with her estranged daughter attracts the attention of a demonic witch.
